creator: kryol@bigmir.net
text:
During upgrade from OO 3.2.1 to 3.3.0 I get a
following error:

2 module(s):
        pyuno
        binfilter
need(s) to be rebuilt

Reason(s):

ERROR: error 65280 occurred while making
/usr/ports/editors/openoffice.org-3/work/OOO330_m20/pyuno/source/loader
ERROR: error 65280 occurred while making
/usr/ports/editors/openoffice.org-3/work/OOO330_m20/binfilter/util

Attention: if you fix the errors in above module(s) you may prolongue your
the build issuing command:

        build --from pyuno binfilter

*** Error code 1


I see in log:

cd ../unxfbsdi.pro/lib && : &&
LD_LIBRARY_PATH=${LD_LIBRARY_PATH+${LD_LIBRARY_PATH}:}/usr/ports/editors/openoffice.org-3/work/OOO330_m20/solver/330/
